AdditionalInput.AdditionalInputValue: Cost recharge position has been defaulted to SOURCED for all location by GET Data Point.
Residency status for NC changed to 'DR' because employee maintained state residency (USRS).
Audit Required: The award has been processed by the gross award value, not a share price and number vesting.

CalculationAttributes.Note: North Carolina: As required by legislation, withholding amounts have been rounded to the nearest dollar.North Carolina: The actual tax obligation is determined on the annual tax return and will depend on factors like filing status and level of other taxable income for the whole tax year.North Carolina: As required by legislation, reporting amounts have been rounded to the nearest dollar.North Carolina: The reportable amount has been rounded.North Carolina: As required by legislation, the basis for withholding has been rounded to the nearest dollar.North Carolina: The withholding has been rounded.North Carolina: This calculation was based on there being USD 98,270.00 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.
United States: This calculation was based on there being USD 92,115.54 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.

USA: Worldwide reporting is required for US citizens or Green Card holders irrespective of their presence during the award period.USA: The actual tax obligation is determined on the annual tax return and will depend on factors like filing status and level of other U.S. taxable income for the whole tax year. Progressive tax rates of between 10% and 39.6% have been applied to determine the estimated tax liability of non-US resident employees.USA: Tax tables for Single employees were used to calculate the estimated US tax liability.United States: This calculation was based on there being USD 98,269.08 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.
United States: This calculation was based on there being USD 93,015.02 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.

United Kingdom: The RSU award is settled in cash. The UK sourced portion of the award income is subject to reporting.United Kingdom: The company does not have a signed Appendix 5 agreement. Double tax relief through foreign tax credits is not available through payroll.UK: The income is assumed to be processed in month 11UK: Tax bands adjusted based on the income being processed on the month 11 payroll.United Kingdom: This calculation was based on there being GBP 59,446.26 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.

United States: The individual is a US National or Green Card Holder. The individual has been in the US during the life of the award, is on US payroll or paying US Social Security, or the company has elected to report the income in the US. Full reporting is required.USA: Supplemental wage withholding rate of 25% (39.6% for supplemental wages in excess of $1M) has been applied. The actual tax obligation is determined on the annual tax return, where progressive tax rates of between 10% and 39.6% apply to total taxable income.United States: This calculation was based on there being USD 98,269.08 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.

United Kingdom: The RSU award is settled in cash. The UK sourced portion of the award income is subject to reporting.United Kingdom: This calculation was based on there being GBP 59,446.26 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.

North Carolina: As required by legislation, withholding amounts have been rounded to the nearest dollar.North Carolina: The individual is non-resident at the taxable event, but left the state in the current tax year, and has not retained state residency. State supplemental withholding rates applied.North Carolina: As required by legislation, reporting amounts have been rounded to the nearest dollar.North Carolina: The reportable amount has been rounded.North Carolina: As required by legislation, the basis for withholding has been rounded to the nearest dollar.North Carolina: The withholding has been rounded.North Carolina: This calculation was based on there being USD 98,270.00 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.
United States: This calculation was based on there being USD 92,115.54 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.
United States: This calculation was based on there being USD 93,015.02 of other income reported in this jurisdiction.
